results.rendered_html:
abhyagra a. [abhimukhaṃ agraṃ yasya]
1 Near, proximate.
2 Fresh, new; idaṃ śoṇitamabhyagre saṃprahāre'cyutattayoḥ  Mb. 
— graṃ Proximity, vicinity.
